reviews.comment:
Solo 1 surtidor para cargar nafta. Cola de 7 autos..más de 40 minutos de espera.

Actualizado 26/12/21
Otra año que pasa. Sigue con solo un surtidor para cargar. 8 autos de cola.

(Translated by Google)
Only one pump for fuel. A line of 7 cars... more than 40 minutes of waiting.

Updated 12/26/21
Another year goes by. Still with only one pump for fuel. Eight cars in line.

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención me toco hoy 13/12/2021 en el Shop, pido un sándwich y después de 35 minutos me dirijo al mostrador para ver que estaba pasando, ya habían cambiado el turno y el chico no sabia nada, al consultarlo con la chica que me atendió no supo que responder.
No lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
I had terrible service today, December 13, 2021, at the Shop. I ordered a sandwich, and after 35 minutes, I went to the counter to see what was happening. They had already changed shifts, and the guy there knew nothing. When I asked the girl who had served me, she didn't know what to say.
I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHbi16ZFNnEAE
